a_image.alt: Japanese Web Design style mood board — Regional Style · Japan

sections.a_eyebrow: Dense · Content Heavy · Grid · Professional · Cultural
sections.a_description: Dense grids of information, tiny text packed into every available pixel, bright red accent labels, and the methodical organization of a culture that values thoroughness over minimalism — Japanese Web Design reflects the unique information architecture of Japan's commercial internet. Where Western design removes, Japanese design adds: more links, more sections, more content, all organized in a surprisingly navigable grid system.

This information-dense style dominates Japanese e-commerce giants, newspaper sites, and corporate portals. You'll see it on railway company sites, department store pages, electronics retailers, and municipal government portals — anywhere that serves a Japanese audience accustomed to scanning dense, content-rich layouts efficiently.

a_image_cover.alt: Japanese Web Design style use case illustration
Japanese Web Design style use case illustration
Japanese Web Design style use case illustration

sections.a_description: The distinctive information-dense style of Japanese commercial websites — packed with content, multiple navigation levels, small text in tight grids, and an efficient use of every pixel. Background: clean white (#ffffff) with thin gray (#e0e0e0) dividers creating a grid-like sectioned layout. The .inner panel uses subtle colored section backgrounds — alternating between white and very light gray (#f8f8f8) blocks. Text is small and dense. Multiple visual elements compete for attention but are organized in a methodical grid. Accent colors: bright red (#e60012) for important labels (the red of Japan's flag), and deep navy (#1a237e). Borders and lines everywhere — thin 1px borders create a newspaper-like columnar feel. Set in Noto Sans JP — designed specifically for Japanese typography with excellent Latin character support, embodying the clean, neutral aesthetic of modern Japanese corporate design. Heading at weight 700, 24px, line-height 1.3, color #1a237e. Eyebrow at weight 500, 10px, uppercase, 2px letter-spacing, color #e60012 (red accent). Body at weight 400, 13px, line-height 1.5, color #333. Buttons are compact: primary — navy (#1a237e), white text, 2px border-radius. Secondary: white, navy border. Alternatives: M PLUS 1p (rounded Japanese), IBM Plex Sans JP (technical), Zen Kaku Gothic New (modern).
